title: Legacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening
description:
Legacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening is Coming SoonFollow Development and Join the CommunityLegacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening is currently in development and coming soon to Steam.

The Ark has fallen, but its story is only beginning. Rebuild a shattered colony ship, restore damaged systems, automate production, expand your crew’s recovery efforts, and uncover the mystery hidden within the Ark’s fractured memory.

For updates, development news, screenshots, and future previews, visit the official website:

You can also join the official Discord community to follow progress, share feedback, ask questions, and be part of the game’s development journey and join the active community of players:

Download Legacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening on Steam and begin exploring the world.

Об игреLegacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening is a sci-fi idle progression game about rebuilding a shattered colony ship after it crashes on an unknown alien world.

The Ark was built to carry humanity across the stars, but something went wrong. Now the ship lies broken beneath a dark alien jungle, its systems offline, its crew scattered, and its memory fractured. What begins as a desperate struggle to restore power slowly becomes something much deeper as the Ark begins to reveal signs of a mystery buried inside its damaged systems.

You begin with only basic crew labor. Every click represents the survivors pushing the wreckage back toward life one repair at a time. Generate Energy, salvage broken components, rebuild equipment, unlock storage systems, and restore the damaged technology needed to keep the Ark alive.

As your progress grows, manual effort gives way to automation. Restored systems, drones, fabrication tools, and optimization upgrades begin to take over the work, allowing your recovery operation to keep expanding even while you are away.

But the Ark is not simply broken.

Something inside it remembers.

Progress deeper into layered idle systems, unlock new menus, restore lost functions, and discover strange anomalies tied to time, memory, and the long awakening of the Ark itself.

What to Expect• Idle and clicker progression built around gathering Energy, repairing systems, and expanding production.

• Resource management through salvage, equipment, storage, and long-term upgrade planning.

• Automation systems that gradually reduce manual effort and increase passive growth.

• Prestige-style progression that lets you reset parts of your recovery in exchange for stronger permanent upgrades.

• A sci-fi story layer that unfolds as the Ark’s damaged systems come back online.

• Crew-based expansion as survivors become part of the larger recovery effort.

• Exploration and mystery tied to the alien world surrounding the crash site.

• Long-term incremental growth designed for players who enjoy steady upgrades, layered systems, and watching numbers climb.

Rebuild the ArkRepair damaged systems. Restore lost technology. Expand production. Recover what was buried in the wreckage.

Each upgrade brings the Ark closer to waking, but every restored system raises new questions. Why did the Ark fall? What survived inside its memory? And what is waiting beyond the first layer of recovery?

The Ark has fallen.

The crew is waiting.

The long awakening has begun.
description_short: Legacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening is a sci-fi idle progression game where you rebuild a shattered colony ship, restore lost systems, automate production, and uncover the mystery hidden within the Ark’s damaged memory.
